changes.description: Replaced verbose 297-line process-heavy debugging methodology with concise 45-line action-oriented bug-fixing guide. Removed 10 supporting files (condition-based-waiting.md, defense-in-depth.md, root-cause-tracing.md, etc.) not referenced by new SKILL.md. New skill focuses on: concrete bug patterns (off-by-one, race conditions, null access, logic errors), actionable steps (read, identify, fix, test), and includes a ready-to-use mutex pattern for race condition fixes.
